ddls:
CREATE TABLE "songs" (
  "song_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each song */,
  "song_title" TEXT /* Title of the song */,
  "artist" TEXT /* Name of the artist */,
  "acousticness" REAL /* Measure of the acousticness of the song */,
  "danceability" REAL /* Measure of the danceability of the song */,
  "duration_ms" INTEGER /* Duration of the song in milliseconds */,
  "energy" REAL /* Measure of the energy of the song */,
  "instrumentalness" REAL /* Measure of the instrumentalness of the song */,
  "key" INTEGER /* Key of the song (0-11 representing C to B) */,
  "liveness" REAL /* Measure of the liveness of the song */,
  "loudness" REAL /* Average loudness of the song in decibels */,
  "mode" INTEGER /* Mode of the song (0 for minor, 1 for major) */,
  "speechiness" REAL /* Measure of the speechiness of the song */,
  "tempo" REAL /* Estimated tempo of the song in beats per minute */,
  "time_signature" INTEGER /* Time signature of the song (e.g., 4 for 4/4) */,
  "valence" REAL /* Measure of the valence (positivity) of the song */,
  "target" INTEGER /* Target value (e.g., 1 for liked songs) */,
  "genre" TEXT /* Genre of the song */,
  "mood" TEXT /* Mood of the song (e.g., happy, sad, energetic) */,
  "album" TEXT /* Album name */,
  "release_date" TEXT /* Release date of the song */,
  "popularity_score" INTEGER /* Popularity score of the song */,
  "explicit" INTEGER /* Indicates if the song contains explicit content */,
  "lyrics" TEXT /* Lyrics of the song (if available) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("song_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "date_joined" TEXT /* Date the user joined the platform */,
  "last_activity" TEXT /* Date of the user's last activity */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., listener, curator, admin) */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Age of the user */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the user */,
  "subscription_type" TEXT /* Type of subscription (e.g., free, premium) */,
  "preferences" TEXT /* User preferences (e.g., preferred genres, moods) */,
  "last_rating" INTEGER /* Last rating given by the user */,
  "total_listening_time" INTEGER /* Total time the user has spent listening to music */,
  "last_playlist_created" INTEGER /* ID of the last playlist created by the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_interactions" (
  "interaction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each interaction event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who interacted with the song */,
  "song_id" INTEGER /* ID of the song being interacted with */,
  "interaction_type" TEXT /* Type of interaction (e.g., play, skip, like) */,
  "interaction_date" TEXT /* Date of the interaction */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating given by the user (if applicable) */,
  "context" TEXT /* Context in which the interaction occurred (e.g., playlist, search, recommendation) */,
  "device" TEXT /* Device used for the interaction (e.g., mobile, desktop) */,
  "location" TEXT /* User's location during the interaction */,
  "listening_time" INTEGER /* Duration the user listened to the song (if applicable) */,
  "contextual_tags" TEXT /* Additional tags or metadata about the interaction */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("interaction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_interactions_song_id FOREIGN KEY ("song_id") REFERENCES songs ("song_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_interactions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "playlists" (
  "playlist_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each playlist */,
  "playlist_name" TEXT /* Name of the playlist */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the playlist */,
  "date_created" TEXT /* Date the playlist was created */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the playlist */,
  "public" INTEGER /* Whether the playlist is public (true) or private (false) */,
  "genre" TEXT /* Genre of the playlist */,
  "mood" TEXT /* Mood of the playlist (e.g., happy, sad, energetic) */,
  "collaborative" INTEGER /* Indicates if the playlist is collaborative */,
  "number_of_songs" INTEGER /* Number of songs in the playlist */,
  "total_duration" INTEGER /* Total duration of the playlist */,
  "average_rating" REAL /* Average rating of the playlist */,
  "followers" INTEGER /* Number of followers of the playlist */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("playlist_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_playlists_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "playlist_songs" (
  "playlist_song_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each playlist-song relationship */,
  "playlist_id" INTEGER /* ID of the playlist */,
  "song_id" INTEGER /* ID of the song */,
  "added_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who added the song to the playlist */,
  "date_added" TEXT /* Date the song was added to the playlist */,
  "order" INTEGER /* Order of the song in the playlist */,
  "play_count" INTEGER /* Number of times the song has been played in the playlist */,
  "last_played" TEXT /* Date the song was last played in the playlist */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("playlist_song_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_playlist_songs_added_by FOREIGN KEY ("added_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_playlist_songs_song_id FOREIGN KEY ("song_id") REFERENCES songs ("song_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_playlist_songs_playlist_id FOREIGN KEY ("playlist_id") REFERENCES playlists ("playlist_id")
)
